TEST_RWA.note: Self-issued testnet fallback — NOT valid on mainnet. Remove before deploy.

BENJI.note: Franklin Templeton BENJI on Stellar mainnet. Verify issuer address before deploy.

oracle.reflector_note: Reflector V3 on Stellar mainnet. Verify address against https://developers.stellar.org/docs/data/oracles/oracle-providers

lending.ltv_note: 75% LTV with conservative margin. See THREAT_MODEL §5.

auditor.note: Auditor BN254 pubkey (field element). Set before mainnet deploy; store privkey in HSM.

circuit_keys_note: MUST point to prod/ not dev/. assert-mainnet-keys.sh enforces this.
vk_ids_note: Fill with on-chain storage slot keys after ceremony + deploy. null = not yet deployed.
